name: 微信公众号文章发布
examples_zh: 围绕'AI对就业的影响'写一篇公众号长文，搜热点+生成封面+发草稿
帮我写一篇 5000 字的公众号文章，用刘润风格分析当前消费趋势
选个最近的科技热点，写成深度文章发到我公众号草稿箱
examples_en: Write a long-form WeChat article on AI's impact on jobs with hot-topic search and cover image
Draft a 5000-word WeChat article in Liu Run's style on consumer trends
Pick a recent tech topic and publish a deep-dive article to my WeChat drafts
